nodes.label: AI as creative phrasing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have creative intuition, so I know that AI cuts down on the time I would normally spend trying to come up with ideas or how to appropriately phrase things

nodes.label: AI understanding of user intent
nodes.grounding_span: it just couldn't grasp what I was asking

nodes.label: AI output quality and appropriateness
nodes.grounding_span: I also prefer that in the general back-and-forth with customers that it doesn't sound as robotic as AI makes it seem sometimes

nodes.label: AI capability in analytical and data-processing tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Any of the analytical tasks or tasks that require attention to detail I am more comfortable completing myself

nodes.label: AI advanced reasoning capability
nodes.grounding_span: Tasks like scheduling and payroll require the advanced reasoning that I don't think AI has quite mastered yet

nodes.label: AI up-to-date knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: to have more up-to-date and current events capabilities in AI

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI cuts down on the time I would normally spend

nodes.label: Personal competence and trust in own judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I still trust my judgement and ability to double-check everything over the automation of AI

nodes.label: Social media relevance and engagement
nodes.grounding_span: it's incredibly valuable to know what type of content, topics, or hashtags are popular in the moment to maintain relevance

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
